mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in industrial production signals robust manufacturing activity, which strengthens corporate earnings and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are negative in 60%+ of instances where INDPRO rises by >1% month-over-month.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 2% (CPIAUCSL) triggers central bank rate hikes, which compress equity valuations and produce negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns exceed 1.5% in 60%+ of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 2.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in GDP (GDPC1) and industrial production (INDPRO) indicates strong economic demand, which boosts corporate profits and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC between GDPC1/INDPRO and SPX 60d returns falls below 0.15 in 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A tight labor market (UNRATE < 4%) increases wage pressures and corporate costs, which suppresses equity returns over the next 20 trading days during late-cycle expansions.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns exceed 1.0% in 50%+ of instances when UNRATE < 4%.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the federal funds rate (FEDFUNDS) below 4.5% signals monetary easing, which lowers discount rates and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns are negative in 60%+ of instances when FEDFUNDS < 4.5%.

mechanism_narrative: High inflation (CPIAUCSL > 2.5%) combined with low rates (FEDFUNDS < 4.0%) creates a 'stagflation' risk, which depresses S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC between CPIAUCSL/FEDFUNDS and SPX 20d returns exceeds 0.20 in 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A surge in housing starts (HOUST > 1300k) indicates strong demand for residential construction, which boosts related sectors and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns are negative in 50%+ of instances when HOUST > 1300.0.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth (PAYEMS > 150k) signals a tightening labor market, which increases corporate hiring costs and suppresses S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns exceed 2.0% in 50%+ of instances when PAYEMS > 150.0.
